nasb.text: and after getting into a boat, they started to cross the sea to Capernaum. It had already become dark, and Jesus had not yet come to them.

esv.text: got into a boat, and started across the sea to Capernaum. It was now dark, and Jesus had not yet come to them.

cnv.text: 他們上了船，要渡海往迦百農去。那時天已經黑了，耶穌還沒有到他們那裡。

ccb.text: 上了船，去湖对岸的迦百农。天色已暗，耶稣还没到他们那里。

csbs.text: 他们上了船，开始渡过湖往迦百农去。原来天色已经黑了，而耶稣还没有来到他们那里。
